trails.name: Lower Mikonui to Mikonui Flat Hut Track
Roberts Point Track
trails.description: This challenging day hike to Roberts Point provides spectacular views of Franz Josef Glacier and the surrounding mountains. It requires good fitness and is best suited to experienced hikers.

trails.name: Whitcombe Pass to Neave Hut Track
Copland Track - Douglas Rock Hut to Copl
Tatare Tunnels Walk
trails.description: The 80-minute walk follows an old 4WD road then the tracks climbs to the old water tunnels. You will need a torch and raincoat to explore the tunnels.

trails.name: Callery Gorge walk
trails.description: Follow the Callery Gorge Walk as it climbs to a high terrace before descending to the Callery River.

trails.name: SEALY TARNS TRACK
trails.description: Climb the 'stairway to heaven' to Sealy Tarns, and enjoy spectacular views and alpine flowers.

trails.name: Lake Wombat Walk
trails.description: This short, easy walk leads through a lush rimu forest to the idyllic Lake Wombat - it's a good option for children.

trails.name: Douglas walk
trails.description: This short, easy forest walk passes by a reflective lake and crosses over glacial landforms - it's suitable for children.

trails.name: Canavans Knob Walk
trails.description: A short climb with rewarding views of the glacier, mountains and river flats.

trails.name: SEALY TARNS TO MUELLER HUT TRACK
Willberg walk
trails.description: The Willberg Walk in Harihari climbs gently through rimu forest.

trails.name: HOOKER TK - WHH Car Park to Hooker Lake
Macaulay Hut Track
trails.description: Macaulay valley can be accessed on foot, or by mountain bike, horse or 4WD.

trails.name: LINK TRACK (Kea Point Tk to WHH CP)
Godley river route
trails.description: Walk or mountain bike up the Godley valley to Red Stag Hut and Godley Hut.

trails.name: Te Ara a Waiau Walkway/Cycleway
trails.description: Walk or cycle through bush from Franz Josef township to the Franz Josef Glacier car park.

trails.name: Mount Sunday Track
trails.description: Walk to the top of Mount Sunday for expansive views of the surrounding countryside.

trails.name: Tekapo Mt John Walkway
trails.description: Mt John is fantastic viewing platform with a 360-degree panorama of the surrounding mountains, lakes and Mackenzie Basin flats.

trails.name: Alex Knob Track
trails.description: This is a challenging day hike with a reward of the best views of Franz Josef Glacier/Kā Roimata o Hine Hukatere without taking a helicopter flight. In summer, make sure you start your hike early to avoid afternoon cloud.

trails.name: Braemar Road to Landslip Creek
trails.description: A public access easement leads to Landslip Creek above Lake Pukaki.

trails.name: Camp Stream Hut Track
trails.description: The steep climb to Camp Stream Hut is part of Te Araroa Trail and is popular with people walking the trail over summer and with ski tourers over winter.

trails.name: Franz Josef Glacier/Kā Roimata o Hine Hukatere Walk
trails.description: Take a short walk through the rainforest to view the Franz Josef Glacier valley.

trails.name: Godley valley tracks
trails.description: Walk or mountain bike up the Godley valley.

trails.name: Harihari Coastal Walkway
trails.description: Harihari Coastal Walkway is one of the most scenic walkways on the West Coast, with spectacular views of forest, rivers, mountains and coastline.

trails.name: Mikonui Catchment - Dickie Ridge/Upper Tuke River Route
trails.description: The Dickie Ridge/Tuke River Route provides a link to challenging alpine tramping opportunities and gives access to the Waitaha and Whitcombe catchments.

trails.name: Moraine Walk
trails.description: Explore old moraine surfaces on this easy, short walk, south of Fox Glacier township.

trails.name: Mount Adams Route
trails.description: Mount Adams sits proudly on the edge of the Adams Wilderness Area in the Southern Alps/Kā Tiritiri o te Moana, and is a focal point for travellers along State Highway 6 from Lake Ianthe to Lake Wahapo.

trails.name: Mount Sunday Track
trails.description: Walk to the top of Mount Sunday for expansive views of the surrounding countryside.

trails.name: Mueller Hut Route
trails.description: This route provides a 360-degree panorama encompassing glaciers, ice cliffs, vertical rock faces and New Zealand’s highest peaks. Mountaineering experience, including using an ice axe, crampons and avalanche rescue equipment, is needed in winter, and some

trails.name: Ōkārito walking tracks
trails.description: North of the Franz Josef Township sits the coastal settlement of Ōkārito and the Ōkārito Lagoon. The lagoon is home to more than 76 species of native birds including the kōtuku/white heron and royal spoonbills.

trails.name: Richmond Trail
trails.description: Enjoy stunning views of Lake Tekapo while walking or riding this track. This track is part of Te Araroa Trail.

trails.name: Tasman River tracks
trails.description: Tasman River is a large braided river which flows into Lake Pukaki. There are walking and cycling tracks in the area.

trails.name: Blue Lakes and Tasman Glacier walks
trails.description: View New Zealand's longest glacier, the mighty Haupapa/Tasman Glacier on one of our best short walks.

trails.name: Te Weheka Walkway/Cycleway
trails.description: Walk or cycle through bush from Fox Glacier township to a viewpoint of the largest active landslide in New Zealand.

trails.name: Terrace Walk
trails.description: The walk provides a good introduction to the rainforest of the Glacier Region as well and an opportunity to see glow worms after dark - it's a great option with children.

trails.name: Hooker Valley Track
trails.description: Enjoy awe-inspiring landscapes and stunning views of Mueller Glacier and Kakīroa/Mount Sefton.  This track currently ends at Kakīroa/Mount Sefton View Lookout, while a new bridge is being built.

trails.name: Peters Pool Walk
trails.description: Enjoy the reflective views of the glacier valley and mountains on this short, easy walk to a small kettle lake - it's a great option with children.

trails.name: Kea Point Track
trails.description: Walk to a viewing deck with stunning views of the surrounding area.

trails.name: Red Tarns Track
trails.description: Walk to tarns with red pond weed and enjoy panoramic views of the surrounding area.

trails.name: Aoraki/Mount Cook village short walks
trails.description: Several walks around the village provide views of Aoraki/Mount Cook and the surrounding native alpine bush - these short, easy options are great for kids.

trails.name: Ball Hut Route
trails.description: Walk to Ball Hut with superb views of the Tasman Glacier and surrounding peaks.

trails.name: Bush Edge Path   Shelter To Red Tarns
trails.description: Wheelchair/Pram Track

trails.name: Fox Glacier Te Ara o Tuawe Valley Walk
trails.description: Short Walk

trails.name: Franz Valley   Forest Walk
trails.description: Wheelchair/Pram Track

trails.name: Hooker Valley Track
trails.description: Enjoy awe-inspiring landscapes and stunning views of Mueller Glacier and Kakīroa/Mount Sefton.  This track currently ends at Kakīroa/Mount Sefton View Lookout, while a new bridge is being built.

trails.name: Okarito Wetland Walk
trails.description:
North of the Franz Josef Township sits the coastal settlement of Ōkārito and the Ōkārito Lagoon. The lagoon is home to more than 76 species of native birds including the kōtuku/white heron and royal spoonbills. From the car park by the Ōkārito School House, the track winds though bush before crossing the estuary on a curving boardwalk.

The track then climbs gently to a viewpoint overlooking the estuary.

trails.name: Tasman Glacier Lake Track
trails.description: Short Walk

trails.name: Waitangitoana Wetland Walk
trails.description: Wheelchair/Pram Track
